_comment: Editable dev/test users. Hit POST /api/auth/dev-login with {"key":"<key>"} (or {"role":"CONSUMER"} to use the first matching role). Edit/add entries and restart the backend. When the DB is reachable these are upserted into the users table; when it is not, a token is still issued from the user_id below so you can test the UI offline. user_id MUST be a valid UUID.
